name: KeyCorp

profile.description: KeyCorp is a bank-based financial services company operating approximately 1,000 branches across 15 states, primarily in the Midwest and Northeast.

innovation.label: DEVELOPING
innovation.analysis: Scored 4/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: WEAK
inspiration.analysis: Scored 3/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($301,499,719 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: MODERATE
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (5/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 6/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 3/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).
